title: Software Engineer
description: Build and maintain software systems, write clean code, and collaborate with engineering teams.

title: Data Scientist
description: Analyze complex datasets to derive insights and build predictive models.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Design and deploy ML models at scale in production environments.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Create engaging user interfaces and experiences for web applications.

title: Backend Developer
description: Build and maintain server-side logic, databases, and APIs.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Develop both frontend and backend components of web applications.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Bridge development and operations, automating infrastructure and deployment pipelines.

title: Cloud Architect
description: Design and oversee cloud infrastructure strategies and architectures.

title: Data Engineer
description: Build data pipelines and infrastructure to support analytics and ML teams.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Protect organizational systems and data from cyber threats and vulnerabilities.

title: Product Manager
description: Define product vision, strategy, and roadmap while working with cross-functional teams.

title: UX/UI Designer
description: Design intuitive and visually appealing user interfaces based on user research.

title: Business Analyst
description: Analyze business processes and data to drive strategic decisions.

title: NLP Engineer
description: Build natural language processing systems and text-based AI applications.

title: AI Research Scientist
description: Conduct fundamental and applied research to advance AI capabilities.
